name: overleaf-git-sync
description: Safely synchronize Overleaf Git projects before and after AI edits.

interface.shortDescription: Pull, commit, and push Overleaf Git projects around AI edits.
interface.longDescription: Overleaf Git Sync gives Codex a guarded Git workflow for Overleaf projects: fast-forward pull before LaTeX edits, optional supervised pull-only polling with automation health checks and dry-run conflict detection, explicit reconcile for same-file edits, commit only selected files afterward, and push back to the Overleaf remote.
defaultPrompt: Set up this Overleaf Git project for safe AI edits.
Sync this Overleaf paper before editing.
Commit and push my LaTeX edits to Overleaf.
Start Overleaf background sync with watcher and heartbeat.
Stop Overleaf background sync and its heartbeat.
